channel.title: +Articles on भाषान्तरेषु विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on भाषान्तरेषु विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: Classicists and sight-reading Latin
item.description: Latin as She is Spoke: How Classicists Tricked Themselves, and the Real Issue with Mary Beard’s Latin Source A.Z. Foreman is a translator and poet who has been obsessed with languages and literature since childhood Not long ago, Mary Beard graced us with a bit of honorable honesty in the Times Literary Supplement, in which she confessed to what is a bit of an open secret among most classicists. She can’t sight-read a complex Latin text all that well.
